5-meo-xxt.note: Little information exists about this combination.

alcohol.note: There is a high risk of memory loss, vomiting and severe ataxia from this combination.

amphetamines.note: Risk of tachycardia, hypertension, and manic states

benzodiazepines.note: Both substances potentiate the ataxia and sedation caused by the other and can lead to unexpected loss of consciousness at high doses. Place the affected individual in the recovery position to prevent vomit aspiration from excess.

cocaine.note: Stimulants taken with MXE can lead to hypermanic states much more easily, especially if sleep is avoided.

dextromethorphan.note: There is a risk of serotonin syndrome when combining DXM with MXE, due to DXM and MXE both being SRI’s. MXE and DXM having notable affinities for the serotonin transporter.

sources.title: A comparison of the binding profiles of dextromethorphan, memantine, fluoxetine and amitriptyline: Treatment of involuntary emotional expression disorder

sources.author: Linda Nguyen, Kelan L. Thomas, Brandon P. Lucke-Wold, John Z. Cavendish, Molly S. Crowe, Rae R. Matsumoto
sources.title: Dextromethorphan: An update on its utility for neurological and neuropsychiatric disorders

diphenhydramine.note: There is a high risk of serotonin syndrome from this combination. Both substances potentiate the ataxia and sedation caused by the other and can lead to unexpected loss of consciousness at high doses. While unconscious, vomit aspiration is a risk if not placed in the recovery position. MXE has a high likelihood of increasing DPH's deliriant effects at higher dosages and can greatly increase the risk of injury, mania, and psychosis. Medical dosages are unlikely to be of concern.

sources.title: Characterization of Diphenhydramine-Related Accidental Overdose Deaths. Academic Forensic Pathology, 5(1), 105–115.

dox.note: As an NMDA antagonist MXE potentiates DOx which can be unpleasantly intense

ghb/gbl.note: Both substances cause ataxia and bring a risk of vomiting and unconsciousness. If the individual falls unconscious while under the influence there is a severe risk of vomit aspiration if they are not placed in the recovery position.

lithium.note: There is a risk of serotonin syndrome when combining Lithium with MXE, as Lithium can induce serotonin syndrome in conjunction with other serotonergic drugs, and MXE has shown a notable affinity for the serotonin transporter.

sources.author: Lenox, R. H., & Hahn, C. G.

sources.title: Venlafaxine Augmentation With Lithium Leading to Serotonin Syndrome (2012)

sources.title: 5-HT1B Receptors: A Novel Target for Lithium: Possible Involvement in Mood Disorders (1999)

sources.title: The Ketamine Analogue Methoxetamine and 3- and 4-Methoxy Analogues of Phencyclidine Are High Affinity and Selective Ligands for the Glutamate NMDA Receptor (2013)

sources.title: New insights into methoxetamine mechanisms of action: Focus on serotonergic 5-HT2 receptors in pharmacological and behavioral effects in the rat (2021)

maois.note: MAO-B inhibitors appear to increase the potency of MXE. MAO-A inhbitors have some negative reports associated with the combination but there isn't much information available

mdma.note: There have been reports of risky serotonergic interactions when the two are taken at the same time, but MXE taken to the end of an MDMA experience does not appear to cause the same issues.

nbomes.note: As an NMDA antagonist MXE potentiates NBOMes which can be unpleasantly intense

opioids.note: This combination can potentiate the effects of the opioid

pcp.note: There are no reports available about this combination

pregabalin.note: Pregabalin and MXE may synergize and increase each other’s negative side effects such as nausea, dizziness, and loss of consciousness. Caution is advised for anything above low dosages due to seizure concerns, and all dosages for individuals with higher risk seizure profiles and or behavior.

ssris.note: Depending on the SSRI this combination can be unpredictable

mxe.dose_note: NOTE: Bodyweight plays a slight factor in MXE dosing, these are values for a 175lb (80kg) male
mxe.name: mxe

properties.avoid: CNS depressants such as alcohol, benzodiazepines, and opioids. Additionally substances that have an effect on serotonin such as MDMA, methamphetamine, and dextromethorphan (DXM).
properties.dose: Insufflated Threshold: 5-10mg Light: 10-20mg Common: 20-35mg Strong: 35-60mg Heavy: 60mg+ M-Hole: 70mg+ | Oral Threshold: 10-15mg Light: 15-25mg Common: 25-35 Strong: 40-65mg M-Hole: 75mg+ | Sublingual Threshold: 5-10mg Low: 10-20mg Common: 40-60mg Strong: 60-75mg M-Hole: 75-100mg | NOTE: Bodyweight plays a slight factor in MXE dosing, these are values for a 175lb (80kg) male
properties.legal: Methoxetamine is scheduled and or controlled in Brazil, Canada, China, EU, Finland, Israel, Japan, Poland, Russia, United Kingdom, United Nations, and the United States (among others).
properties.onset: Insufflated: 5-20 minutes | Oral: 30-60 minutes | Sublingual: 15-45 minutes
properties.summary: A dissociative drug which is an analogue of ketamine. It is reported to be less sedating and more potent by weight. Anectodal reports indicate it has a subjectively more 'complicated' set of effects.
